description_long: This hammer features a rustic, naturalistic design with a head that resembles a roughly hewn log, complete with bark texture and subtle green mossy patches. The handle is an organic, twisting vine-like structure adorned with small green leaves, giving it a whimsical, almost fantasy-inspired appearance. The head is rectangular with uneven surfaces and a small protruding nub on top, suggesting it was crafted from a single piece of wood. The striking face is flat but irregular, and the opposite end is similarly blunt, lacking any claw or peen. The handle appears slender and slightly curved, with visible nodes and offshoots, enhancing its natural look. Overall, the hammer combines earthy tones of brown and green, and its construction suggests it is more decorative or thematic than utilitarian.
description: A rustic hammer with a log-like head and a twisting vine handle adorned with green leaves, featuring earthy brown and green tones.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rectangular, bark-textured head and the vine handle with leaves extending downward.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the circular cross-section of the log head and the slender, twisting handle.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the flat back of the head and the vine handle, with the protruding nub visible on top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the rounded end of the log head and the organic curvature of the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Curved, vine-like wooden handle with small green leaves, textured and organic in appearance.
attribute_head_type: Rectangular, log-shaped wooden head with bark texture and a small protruding nub; both faces are flat and blunt.
